response:
An anonymous function in Python can be built using `lambda` to check if a number is prime or composite. The function will use the modulus operator to determine status.  

* * *  

The modulus operator helps identify divisors other than one and the number itself. This process reveals the status of the number clearly.  

* * *  

A prime number has no divisors besides one and itself. A composite number has more than two divisors, changing its status.
